particulars.description: Freehold property known as 11-14 wyvern building, grove trading estate, dorchester, dorset, DT1 1ST being all of the land and buildings in title DT312008 & DT192539 including all buildings, fixtures and fittings, the related rights and the goodwill.

All that the freehold interest in the land and property known as units 11 and 12 wyvern buildings, grove trading estate, dorchester DT1 1ST and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number DT192539. All that the freehold interest in the land and property known as units 13 and 14 wyvern buildings, grove trading estate, dorchester DT1 1ST and registered at the land registry with title absolute under title number DT312008.
